summary: Video edited in a trailer style. It opens on an aerial drone shot tracking the border wall, splices in a CNN interview clip of a masked man described on screen as a cartel leader saying 'once you get in, you can't get out' and news footage of people wading across a river, then ends on a title card reading 'CBP PRESENTS ... THE MOST SECURE BORDER IN HISTORY.' Metadata reports no audio track.

script.scene: Aerial drone shot tracking the steel border wall stretching toward mountains, with a Mexican border town on one side and a road and rail line on the U.S. side.
CNN clip, interior of an SUV: a masked man in sunglasses and a tactical vest sits for an interview; a LIVE bug is visible.
CNN two-shot, reporter facing the masked man; chyron 'CARTEL LEADER WARNS: ONCE YOU GET IN, YOU CAN'T GET OUT.'
News footage of a group of people wading across a river between brushy banks with scattered debris on the shore.
Title card over a drone shot of the border wall and open road: 'CBP PRESENTS / In collaboration with USBP and partners / THE MOST SECURE BORDER IN HISTORY.'

notable_text: CBP PRESENTS; In collaboration with USBP and partners; THE MOST SECURE BORDER IN HISTORY; CNN chyron 'CARTEL LEADER WARNS: ONCE YOU GET IN, YOU CAN'T GET OUT'; tweet: 'Making life harder for cartel members, it's what we do.'
